ddls:
CREATE TABLE "urban_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the urban area */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the urban area in square kilometers */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the urban area */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commute_patterns" (
  "commute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commute pattern record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "average_commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time in minutes */,
  "commute_mode" TEXT /* Predominant commute mode (e.g., car, public transport) */,
  "commuters_count" INTEGER /* Number of commuters */,
  "public_transport_usage" REAL /* Percentage of commuters using public transport */,
  "average_commute_distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled during commute in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commute_patterns_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "percentage_of_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population engaged in this occupation */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the occupation belongs (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in this age group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution within the age group (e.g., 60% male, 40% female) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution within the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, urban planner, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs (e.g., planning, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., economic, demographic) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (e.g., report, visualization) the permission applies to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., report, visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
